concept.name: Data packets
concept.definition: Small labeled chunks that a message is chopped into before being sent across a network, each traveling on its own and carrying enough information to be put back in order.

audience: a curious adult with no domain background
atomic_reason: One short figure can show the whole mechanism: a message gets chopped into pieces, each piece gets a label with an address and a position number, the pieces travel separately, and the labels let the receiver reassemble them. The only idea it leans on is a network as computers that can send things to each other, which is everyday knowledge for anyone who uses the internet.
